I know, I know, the internet is flooded with Articles and Videos about AI, AI models, and AI tools, but there are some of the most basic terms in AI thrown around so casually, and most of us don’t understand them. In this article, I am going to share some of the most common AI terms, so the next time someone uses them, you will have a better understanding of what they are trying to convey. So let’s get started.
- Artificial Intelligence (AI)
Let’s start with the basics. The term AI, or Artificial Intelligence, means a system that performs tasks that require human intelligence. In the good old days, AI used to be simple computer programs that would perform repetitive tasks for humans, but now, since the processing power and the data storage have become huge and compact, AI can perform creative tasks as well.
- Machine Learning (ML)
